title: Close the M1 simulation kernel gate
summary: Integrate reviewed M1 simulation-kernel work, run the full M1 gate, update roadmap status and prepare the project for the next gameplay slice without skipping independent review.
acceptance: Headless 100k tick hauling/building scenario is reproducible and reviewed
Browser Worker and Node produce the same authoritative hash for the M1 scenario
50k empty or inert entities show no sustained queue or memory growth
M1 residual risks, benchmark artifacts, save/replay impact and next M2 entry criteria are documented
